note: Michigan pastors / churches with public pro-life signals strong enough to warrant a direct abolition-outreach email. These aren't published on the public site; they're a private working list for AAM to contact and, if the pastor confirms an abolition-aligned position, promote to the NXR directory as `abolitionStance='pro_abolition'`. Sourced during the 2026-07-23 metro-Reformed research pass.

candidates.name: Grace Bible Church
candidates.abortionEvidence: 4-part sermon series titled "Abortion: The Murdering of Innocent Life" (Parts 1-4). Strongest pulpit abortion content found in the six built-city metros.
candidates.reasonToOutreach: Their sermon language calls abortion "murder of innocent life" — stronger than mainstream pro-life. Would need direct pastoral contact to verify whether they hold the strict abolition position (immediate, total, no exceptions, criminalization as homicide) or the softer Dispensational pro-life view.

candidates.name: University Reformed Church
candidates.abortionEvidence: Pastor Helopoulos led a public prayer against Proposition 3 (Michigan's 2022 abortion-rights constitutional amendment) during worship. Prior pastor Kevin DeYoung is a prolific pro-life writer at The Gospel Coalition.
candidates.reasonToOutreach: Publicly-pro-life PCA church in Lansing's satellite city (state capital metro). Currently classified `incrementalist` in NXR by denominational default. The Prop-3 prayer suggests possible openness to a stricter position — worth asking directly.
